## Before submitting

Please confirm:

- [ ] I checked the Configuration wiki.
- [ ] I checked whether this is already supported in YAML.
- [ ] I checked the pinned discussion about YAML-only features: https://github.com/superdingo101/daylight-calendar-card/discussions/286
- [ ] I searched existing issues and discussions.

## Is this a new feature or a visual editor request?

- [ ] This feature does not exist today.
- [ ] This feature exists in YAML, but I want it added to the visual editor.
- [ ] I am not sure.

### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

### Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. Mock-ups of what you'd like to see can be very helpful.
